cards.front: 一般现在时第三人称单数规则
cards.back:
动词+s/es
特殊：have→has，be→is
以s/x/ch/sh/o结尾+es
辅音+y结尾，y→ies
be动词（am/is/are）+ 动词-ing
cards.example: I am studying. / She is running.

cards.front: 一般过去时规则动词变化
cards.back:
动词+ed
末尾e：+d
辅音+y：y→i+ed
辅元辅（重读）：双写末辅音+ed

cards.front: 常见不规则动词（过去式）
cards.back:
go→went，have→had，do→did
come→came，see→saw，take→took
buy→bought，bring→brought
begin→began，write→wrote

will + 动词原形（表示预测/意愿）
be going to + 动词原形（表示计划/已有迹象）
cards.example: It will rain tomorrow. / I'm going to study.

cards.back:
have/has + 过去分词
yet（否定/疑问）/already（肯定）/just/ever/never
cards.example: I have already finished. / Have you eaten yet?

cards.back:
be动词 + 过去分词
时态通过be动词体现
cards.example:
The book was written by Tolstoy.
English is spoken worldwide.

cards.front: 情态动词 can/could/may/might/must 区别
cards.back:
can=能力/许可；could=过去式/更礼貌
may=可以/可能；might=更小的可能
must=必须/一定（肯定推断）
must not=禁止；don't have to=不必要
cards.example: You must study. / You don't have to come.

cards.back:
that（陈述句）：I think that...
if/whether（一般疑问句）：I wonder if...
疑问词（特殊疑问句）：I know where he lives.
cards.example: I don't know what time it is.

cards.back:
先行词是物：which/that
先行词是人：who/that（主语）；whom（宾语）
表示所属：whose
cards.example: The book which I read was great. / The man who helped me is kind.

cards.front: 状语从句：时间/条件/原因/结果
cards.back:
时间：when/while/after/before/until
条件：if/unless（unless=if not）
原因：because/since/as
结果：so...that/such...that
cards.example: If it rains, I'll stay home. / It was so cold that I stayed inside.

cards.back:
myself/yourself/himself/herself/itself
ourselves/yourselves/themselves
用法：①强调 ②做宾语（主宾同一人）
cards.example: I did it myself. / Please help yourself.

cards.front: 比较级和最高级构成规则
cards.back:
单音节：+er/est
e结尾：+r/st
辅元辅：双写+er/est
多音节：more/most + 形容词
不规则：good→better→best；bad→worse→worst

there is + 单数/不可数名词
there are + 复数名词
就近原则：最近的名词决定be动词形式
cards.example: There is a cat and two dogs. (近的是cat，用is)

cards.back:
some：something/someone/somebody（肯定句/疑问句请求）
any：anything/anyone/anybody（否定句/疑问句）
every：everything/everyone（每个）
no：nothing/nobody（没有）
cards.example: Is anyone there? / I have something to tell you.

cards.back:
①做主语：Swimming is fun.
②做宾语（特定动词后）：enjoy/mind/keep/finish + doing
③介词后：be good at doing
cards.example: I enjoy reading. / She is good at singing.

cards.front: 动词不定式 (to do) 的用法
cards.back:
①做主语：To learn English is fun.
②做宾语：want/hope/decide/plan + to do
③做目的状语：I came to help.
④形容词后：happy/glad/ready to do
cards.example: I want to eat. / She decided to leave.

cards.front: 可数名词与不可数名词
cards.back:
不可数名词常见：water/milk/food/money/news/advice/information/weather
量化不可数：a glass of water / a piece of advice
不可数不加s，不用a/an

a/an：不定冠词，泛指，第一次提到
a+辅音音素；an+元音音素
the：定冠词，特指，上文提到过，独一无二
cards.example: I saw a dog. The dog was brown. / the sun/moon/earth

cards.back:
What + a/an + 形容词 + 单数可数名词！
What + 形容词 + 不可数/复数名词！
How + 形容词/副词！
cards.example: What a beautiful day! / How clever she is!
